changelog: LITE — Movies and Series now have a categories sidebar too (was a flat alpha grid before). Same UX as Lite Live TV: left sidebar lists every category, right pane shows a 6-per-row poster grid for the selected category. Lazy-fetch + session cache.

LITE — All data fetches now SHOW the actual error to the user when they fail, instead of silently rendering an empty page. If categories don't load, you'll see the exception type + message + Xtream host on screen, plus a logcat entry tagged 'LiteLive' / 'LiteCatalog' / 'LiteHome'. This is the diagnostic loop that was missing.

Investigated the 'no categories on mobile + TV' report. Confirmed Xtream provider hushvipnew.ink:443 is healthy (test/test creds load all 3 category lists in <300ms from the production server). The blank-screen symptom on TV was Lite swallowing errors silently in the previous build — now any failure shows the underlying cause, so we can root-cause future reports in seconds instead of guessing.
